name: CLX - Admin LUXI Proxy Bid v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Admin-gated auto-bid (proxy/max bid). Registers a bidder's MAX for an auction; the engine then auto-bids one increment above the competition up to that max. Body: { auction_id, bidder_handle, platform, max_amount (dollars) | max_cents }.
